2.name: Two-Headed Nurse
2.describe: On death splits into two Grudge Guards; takes +50% fire and lightning damage.

3.name: Grudge Guard
3.describe: A wraith formed from concentrated malice.

4.name: Hound
4.describe: May gain a burst of speed after moving; takes +50% ice damage.
4.Specialeffects: Takes +50% ice damage; after moving 500 px, 30% chance +40% move speed for 5s.

5.name: Basketball Zombie
5.describe: Loves singing, dancing and hoops; ranged; takes +50% fire and lightning damage.
5.Specialeffects: Ranged; takes +50% fire and lightning damage.

6.name: Basketball Zombie (Elite)
6.describe: Loves singing, dancing and hoops; ranged; takes +50% fire and lightning damage.
6.Specialeffects: Ranged; takes +50% fire and lightning damage.

7.name: Couch Potato
7.describe: Hard to knock back, immune to stun; +50% fire damage; burn duration +100%.
7.Specialeffects: Knockback -80%; immune to stun; +50% fire damage; burn duration doubled.

8.name: Rolling Ball Boss
8.describe: Moves slowly; deals massive damage to the wall.
8.Specialeffects: Moves slowly; deals massive damage to the wall.

9.name: Vulture
9.describe: Flying enemy; immune to ground skills; special movement pattern.
9.Specialeffects: Immune to ground skills; every 2s changes direction within 180° ahead (random, stays on screen 81×72).

10.name: Vulture (Elite)
10.describe: Flying enemy; immune to ground skills; special movement pattern.
10.Specialeffects: Immune to ground skills; every 2s changes direction within 180° ahead (random, stays on screen 81×72).

11.name: Mummy Zombie
11.describe: Below 30% HP stops moving; over 5s heals 50% HP; +100% fire damage; burn duration +100%.
11.Specialeffects: Below 30% HP stops moving; over 5s heals 50% HP; +100% fire damage; burn duration +100%.

12.name: Mummy (Elite)
12.describe: Below 30% HP stops moving; over 5s heals 50% HP; summons Mummy Zombies; +100% fire damage; burn duration +100%.
12.Specialeffects: Below 30% HP stops moving; over 5s heals 50% HP; summons multiple Mummy Zombies; +100% fire damage; burn duration +100%.

13.name: Shock Therapy Zombie
13.describe: Ranged; -50% lightning damage and paralysis time; +50% projectile damage.
13.Specialeffects: Ranged; -50% lightning damage and paralysis time; +50% projectile damage.

14.name: Shock Therapy Zombie (Elite)
14.describe: Ranged; -50% lightning damage and paralysis time; +50% projectile damage.
14.Specialeffects: Ranged; -50% lightning damage and paralysis time; +50% projectile damage.

15.name: Three-Head Nurse (Elite)
15.describe: Heals 5% HP within 3s after taking damage; on death splits into two Grudge Guards; +50% fire and lightning damage.
15.Specialeffects: Heals 5% HP within 3s after damage; on death splits into two Grudge Guards; +50% fire and lightning damage.

17.name: Snowman Zombie
17.describe: -50% ice damage and freeze time; +50% fire damage; burn duration +100%.
17.Specialeffects: -50% ice damage and freeze time; +50% fire damage; burn duration +100%.

18.name: Elk (Elite)
18.describe: -50% ice damage and freeze time; +50% fire damage; burn duration +100%.
18.Specialeffects: -50% ice damage and freeze time; +50% fire damage; burn duration +100%.

19.name: Thunder Zombie
19.describe: -60% lightning damage and -50% paralysis time; +50% fire damage.
19.Specialeffects: -60% lightning damage and -50% paralysis time; +50% fire damage.

20.name: Thunder God Zombie (Elite)
20.describe: -60% lightning damage and -50% paralysis time; +50% fire damage.
20.Specialeffects: -60% lightning damage and -50% paralysis time; +50% fire damage.

21.name: Flame Zombie
21.describe: -70% fire damage; immune to burn, freeze and frostbite; +100% ice damage; heals 5% HP when hit by fire.
21.Specialeffects: -70% fire damage; immune to burn, freeze and frostbite; +100% ice damage; each fire hit restores 5% HP.

22.name: Death Knight (Elite)
22.describe: -70% fire damage; immune to burn, freeze and frostbite; +100% ice damage; heals 10% HP when hit by fire.
22.Specialeffects: -70% fire damage; immune to burn, freeze and frostbite; +100% ice damage; each fire hit restores 10% HP.

23.name: Scorpion
23.describe: Immune to knockback; multi-hit; -50% lightning damage; +50% ice damage.
23.Specialeffects: Immune to knockback; multi-hit; -50% lightning damage; +50% ice damage; combo: attacks 3 times then enters CD.

24.name: Nuke Dragon (Elite)
24.describe: Immune to knockback; multi-hit; -50% lightning damage; lightning hits grant +50% move speed; +50% ice damage.
24.Specialeffects: Immune to knockback; multi-hit; -50% lightning damage; +50% ice damage; combo attacks; lightning damage grants +50% move speed for 3s.

25.name: Roadblock Zombie
25.describe: -70% projectile damage; immune to burn, stun and knockback; +200% lightning damage.
25.Specialeffects: -70% projectile damage; immune to burn, stun and knockback; +200% lightning damage.

26.name: Brawler Zombie (Elite)
26.describe: -70% projectile damage; immune to burn, stun and knockback; +200% lightning damage.
26.Specialeffects: -70% projectile damage; immune to burn, stun and knockback; +200% lightning damage.

27.name: Football Zombie
27.describe: -50% physical damage; +50% energy damage; Armor blocks 6 hits and debuffs.
27.Specialeffects: -50% physical damage; +50% energy damage; Armor negates 6 hits and negative effects.

28.name: Football Zombie (Elite)
28.describe: -50% physical damage; +50% energy damage; Armor blocks 15 hits and debuffs.
28.Specialeffects: -50% physical damage; +50% energy damage; Armor negates 15 hits and negative effects.

29.name: Frost Witch
29.describe: Immune to freeze, burn and paralysis; cannot be knocked back or pierced; blocks all projectiles; -80% ice damage; +200% fire damage.
29.Specialeffects: Immune to freeze, burn, paralysis; cannot be knocked back or pierced; blocks projectiles; -80% ice damage; +200% fire damage.

30.name: Frost Witch (Elite)
30.describe: Immune to freeze, burn and paralysis; cannot be knocked back or pierced; blocks all projectiles; -80% ice damage; +200% fire damage.
30.Specialeffects: Immune to freeze, burn, paralysis; cannot be knocked back or pierced; blocks projectiles; -80% ice damage; +200% fire damage.

31.name: Creeper
31.describe: +50% fire damage; explodes on death, heavy wall damage and knocks nearby foes back.
31.Specialeffects: +50% fire damage; death explosion damages wall heavily and knocks back nearby enemies.

32.name: Creeper (Elite)
32.describe: +50% fire damage; explodes on death, heavy wall damage and knocks nearby foes back.
32.Specialeffects: +50% fire damage; death explosion damages wall heavily and knocks back nearby enemies.

33.name: Abyss Lord Boss
33.describe: Immune to burn; cannot be knocked back; when frozen heals HP; -90% ice damage; +50% lightning damage; leaves water trail (+40% ally speed, 5s).
33.Specialeffects: Immune to burn; cannot be knocked back; frozen restores 15% HP; -90% ice damage; +50% lightning damage; water trail underfoot: allies +40% speed, 5s.

34.name: Flame Tyrant Boss
34.describe: Immune to fire; cannot be knocked back, ignited, stunned or paralyzed; +50% ice damage; ignites the wall for DoT.
34.Specialeffects: Immune to fire; cannot be knocked back, ignited, stunned or paralyzed; +50% ice damage; wall attacks ignite wall for 3% max HP per second.

35.name: Warden Boss
35.describe: Immune to all control and knockback; -70% lightning and energy damage.
35.Specialeffects: Immune to all control and knockback; -70% lightning and energy damage.

36.name: Skibidi Boss
36.describe: Blocks all skills; cannot be pierced; -50% physical damage.
36.Specialeffects: Blocks all skills; cannot be pierced; -50% physical damage.

37.name: Wild-Hair Boss
37.describe: Immune to all control and knockback; -60% physical damage; +100% wind damage.
37.Specialeffects: Immune to all control and knockback; -60% physical damage; +100% wind damage.

38.name: Imp Zombie
38.describe: Immune to all control; -80% wind damage; on death throws a Giant Ghost 300 units forward.
38.Specialeffects: Immune to all control; -80% wind damage; on death throws Giant Ghost Zombie 300 units forward.

39.describe: Immune to all control; -80% wind damage; on death throws Giant Ghost (Elite) 300 units forward.
39.Specialeffects: Immune to all control; -80% wind damage; on death throws Giant Ghost Zombie (Elite) 300 units forward.

40.name: Early Bird Zombie
40.describe: Cannot be knocked back; -70% physical and laser damage; +100% fire damage; on death spawns Nightcap Zombie.
40.Specialeffects: Cannot be knocked back; -70% physical and laser damage; +100% fire damage; on death spawns Nightcap Zombie.

41.Specialeffects: Cannot be knocked back; -70% physical and laser damage; +100% fire damage; on death spawns furious Nightcap Zombie.

42.name: Giant Ghost Zombie

42.Specialeffects: Immune to all control; -80% wind damage.

43.describe: Immune to all control; -80% wind damage.
43.Specialeffects: Immune to all control; -80% wind damage.

44.describe: Cannot be knocked back; -70% physical and laser damage; +100% fire damage.
44.Specialeffects: Cannot be knocked back; -70% physical and laser damage; +100% fire damage.

117.name: Golden Toad
117.describe: A giant toad obsessed with gold.
